submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
N = 4
Q = np.array([[np.exp(2j*np.pi*j*k/N) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)], dtype=complex) / np.sqrt(N)
golden = Q.conj().T
submissions.construction_method: Conjugate transpose of raw 2-qubit QFT matrix per spec.
submissions.self_check: Verified U @ U.conj().T ≈ I and shape (4,4).

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
S = np.diag([1,1j]).astype(complex)
Z = np.diag([1,-1]).astype(complex)
def gate_on_qubits(G,n,qubits):
    m=len(qubits); dim=2**n; U=np.zeros((dim,dim),dtype=complex)
    mask=sum(1<<(n-1-k) for k in range(n) if k not in qubits); pos={q:i for i,q in enumerate(qubits)}
    for i in range(dim):
        bits=[(i>>(n-1-k))&1 for k in range(n)]; sub=sum(bits[q]*(2**(m-1-pos[q])) for q in qubits)
        v=np.zeros(2**m,dtype=complex); v[sub]=1; vo=G@v; other=i&mask
        for so in range(2**m):
            if abs(vo[so])<1e-15: continue
            bo=bits.copy()
            for q in qubits: bo[q]=(so>>(m-1-pos[q]))&1
            j=other|sum(bo[k]*(2**(n-1-k)) for k in range(n)); U[j,i]+=vo[so]
    return U
def controlled_single(n,ctrl,tgt,U1):
    dim=2**n; U=np.zeros((dim,dim),dtype=complex)
    for i in range(dim):
        bits=[(i>>(n-1-k))&1 for k in range(n)]
        if bits[ctrl]==0: U[i,i]=1; continue
        inp=np.zeros(2,dtype=complex); inp[bits[tgt]]=1; out=U1@inp
        for t2 in range(2):
            if abs(out[t2])<1e-15: continue
            b2=bits.copy(); b2[tgt]=t2; j=sum(b2[k]*(2**(n-1-k)) for k in range(n)); U[j,i]+=out[t2]
    return U
N=4; Q=np.array([[np.exp(2j*np.pi*j*k/N) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(N)
H01=gate_on_qubits(H,3,[0])@gate_on_qubits(H,3,[1])
golden=gate_on_qubits(Q.conj().T,3,[0,1])@controlled_single(3,1,2,S)@controlled_single(3,0,2,Z)@H01
submissions.construction_method: QPE of S: H on counting q0,q1, then ctrl-Z(q0,t2) for U^2, ctrl-S(q1,t2) for U^1, then IQFT on {q0,q1}.
submissions.self_check: Verified U @ U.conj().T ≈ I and shape (8,8).

import numpy as np
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
T = np.diag([1,np.exp(1j*np.pi/4)]).astype(complex)
def gate_on_qubits(G,n,qubits):
    m=len(qubits); dim=2**n; U=np.zeros((dim,dim),dtype=complex)
    mask=sum(1<<(n-1-k) for k in range(n) if k not in qubits); pos={q:i for i,q in enumerate(qubits)}
    for i in range(dim):
        bits=[(i>>(n-1-k))&1 for k in range(n)]; sub=sum(bits[q]*(2**(m-1-pos[q])) for q in qubits)
        v=np.zeros(2**m,dtype=complex); v[sub]=1; vo=G@v; other=i&mask
        for so in range(2**m):
            if abs(vo[so])<1e-15: continue
            bo=bits.copy()
            for q in qubits: bo[q]=(so>>(m-1-pos[q]))&1
            j=other|sum(bo[k]*(2**(n-1-k)) for k in range(n)); U[j,i]+=vo[so]
    return U
def controlled_single(n,ctrl,tgt,U1):
    dim=2**n; U=np.zeros((dim,dim),dtype=complex)
    for i in range(dim):
        bits=[(i>>(n-1-k))&1 for k in range(n)]
        if bits[ctrl]==0: U[i,i]=1; continue
        inp=np.zeros(2,dtype=complex); inp[bits[tgt]]=1; out=U1@inp
        for t2 in range(2):
            if abs(out[t2])<1e-15: continue
            b2=bits.copy(); b2[tgt]=t2; j=sum(b2[k]*(2**(n-1-k)) for k in range(n)); U[j,i]+=out[t2]
    return U
N=8; Q=np.array([[np.exp(2j*np.pi*j*k/N) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(N)
H012=gate_on_qubits(H,4,[0])@gate_on_qubits(H,4,[1])@gate_on_qubits(H,4,[2])
golden=gate_on_qubits(Q.conj().T,4,[0,1,2])@controlled_single(4,2,3,T)@controlled_single(4,1,3,T@T)@controlled_single(4,0,3,T@T@T@T)@H012
submissions.construction_method: QPE of T: H on q0,q1,q2; ctrl-T^4(q0,t3), ctrl-T^2(q1,t3), ctrl-T(q2,t3); IQFT on counting register.
submissions.self_check: Verified U @ U.conj().T ≈ I and shape (16,16).

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
def gate_on_qubits(G,n,qubits):
    m=len(qubits); dim=2**n; U=np.zeros((dim,dim),dtype=complex)
    mask=sum(1<<(n-1-k) for k in range(n) if k not in qubits); pos={q:i for i,q in enumerate(qubits)}
    for i in range(dim):
        bits=[(i>>(n-1-k))&1 for k in range(n)]; sub=sum(bits[q]*(2**(m-1-pos[q])) for q in qubits)
        v=np.zeros(2**m,dtype=complex); v[sub]=1; vo=G@v; other=i&mask
        for so in range(2**m):
            if abs(vo[so])<1e-15: continue
            bo=bits.copy()
            for q in qubits: bo[q]=(so>>(m-1-pos[q]))&1
            j=other|sum(bo[k]*(2**(n-1-k)) for k in range(n)); U[j,i]+=vo[so]
    return U
def controlled_work_mult(n,control,work_qubits,power):
    m=len(work_qubits); dim=2**n; pos={q:i for i,q in enumerate(work_qubits)}; mult=pow(2,power,15)
    U=np.zeros((dim,dim),dtype=complex)
    for i in range(dim):
        bits=[(i>>(n-1-k))&1 for k in range(n)]
        if bits[control]==0: U[i,i]=1; continue
        y=sum(bits[q]*(2**(m-1-pos[q])) for q in work_qubits)
        y_new=15 if y==15 else (mult*y)%15; bo=bits.copy()
        for q in work_qubits: bo[q]=(y_new>>(m-1-pos[q]))&1
        j=sum(bo[k]*(2**(n-1-k)) for k in range(n)); U[j,i]=1
    return U
N=8; Q=np.array([[np.exp(2j*np.pi*j*k/N) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)],dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(N)
work=[3,4,5,6]
Hcount=gate_on_qubits(H,7,[0])@gate_on_qubits(H,7,[1])@gate_on_qubits(H,7,[2])
golden=gate_on_qubits(Q.conj().T,7,[0,1,2])@controlled_work_mult(7,2,work,1)@controlled_work_mult(7,1,work,2)@controlled_work_mult(7,0,work,4)@Hcount
submissions.construction_method: Shor N=15,a=2: H on counting; ctrl-(×2^4) q0, ctrl-(×2^2) q1, ctrl-(×2) q2 on work; IQFT on {q0,q1,q2}.
submissions.self_check: Verified U @ U.conj().T ≈ I and shape (128,128).
